overall_goal: Contain and mitigate potential compromise due to impossible travel event for user bob.

steps.description: Gather all authentication logs for user bob around the time of the reported travel.
steps.rationale: Provides evidence to confirm or refute the impossible travel claim and identify any anomalous logins.

steps.description: Analyze the collected logs to verify geographic locations, device fingerprints, and time stamps.
steps.rationale: Determines whether the travel is truly impossible or a result of spoofed data.

steps.description: Temporarily lock bob's Okta account to prevent further access.
steps.rationale: Prevents potential misuse while investigation is ongoing.

steps.description: Revoke all active sessions for bob across all applications.
steps.rationale: Ensures any compromised session is terminated immediately.

steps.description: Enable multi‑factor authentication for bob's account if not already enabled.
steps.rationale: Adds an additional layer of security to prevent future unauthorized access.

steps.description: Inform user bob of the incident, actions taken, and any required follow‑up steps.
steps.rationale: Maintains transparency and encourages user vigilance.

steps.description: Conduct a deeper forensic review of bob's account activity and related systems.
steps.rationale: Identifies any additional indicators of compromise or policy violations.

steps.description: Update the incident status to closed or resolved after all actions are verified.
steps.rationale: Ensures accurate record‑keeping and compliance with incident management processes.
